hooks.command: [ "$(git branch --show-current)" != "main" ] || { echo '{"block": true, "message": "Cannot edit files on main branch. Create a feature branch first with: git checkout -b feature/description"}' >&2; exit 2; }

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(jsx|js)$ ]] && [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ client/ ]]; then
  cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/client" && npx vite build --mode development 2>&1 | tail -5
  exit 0
fi
